The Dealer Program Built for Growth

The contract that brings them back.Every season.

Whitestone Partners gives your dealership a guaranteed maintenance program that keeps customers coming back — and puts more money in everyone's pocket.

Boats were built for family memories.
Not financial headaches.

We're a group of visionaries who see a better future for boat ownership — and for the dealerships who make it possible. Whitestone Partners is a boat service contract program built exclusively for marine dealers. We handle the contracts and billing. You do what you're already great at. Your customers stay loyal because that's where their contract lives.

We handle the admin You do the work Customers stay loyal Everyone earns more

Simple process

Three steps to a better dealership.

01

Apply to the Network

Fill out our dealer inquiry form. We'll reach out within 1-2 business days to walk you through the program.

02

Get Certified

Sign your dealer agreement, get your portal login, and learn the simple ticket process. Set up in hours, not weeks.

03

Start Earning

Enroll customers, perform covered services, submit tickets. Get reimbursed per service plus a kickback on every contract sold.

What's covered

10 services. One annual contract.

Every covered service is tied to engine hours or season — so the schedule drives itself. Your customers come back because their contract brings them back.

Our story

Visionaries for a better boating industry.

We believe boats were built for family memories — not financial headaches. Whitestone Partners exists to make that real.

Who we are

A new standard for marine service contracts.

Whitestone Partners LLC is a boat service contract company based in St. George, Utah. We partner with certified marine dealers to deliver comprehensive annual maintenance contracts to boat owners — making ownership simpler, more affordable, and more enjoyable.

Our program is dealer-first by design. We handle the contracts, billing, and administration. Dealers handle the work they're already great at. Boat owners get peace of mind. Everyone wins.

Transparency

One flat rate, no hidden fees, no surprises.

Reliability

Certified dealers, consistent standards, documented history.

Simplicity

One contract covers everything for a full year.

Partnership

We succeed when our dealers and customers succeed.

Whether you're a dealer ready to apply or a boat owner looking for coverage — our team is here.

Terms & Conditions
Please read this agreement carefully before registering your boat.
1. Contract Overview

Whitestone Partners LLC offers annual boat maintenance contracts covering ten (10) core services performed by our certified dealer network. The contract is valid for one (1) year from activation.

2. Covered Services

Your contract covers ten services: Summer Prep (yearly), Impeller Service (beginning of season / every 50 hrs), Engine Oil Service (yearly / every 50 hrs), Fuel Filter Service (every 150 hrs), Transmission Oil Service (yearly / every 100 hrs), Outdrive Service (yearly / every 100 hrs — inboard/outboard vessels), Shaft Alignment (yearly / every 150 hrs), Winterization (yearly), V-Drive Service (yearly / every 200 hrs — V-drive vessels only), and Ballast Cartridge Service (every 100 hrs — ballast-equipped vessels only). Note: Outdrive Service and V-Drive Service are mutually exclusive depending on vessel type.

3. Exclusions

Not covered: misuse or neglect damage, accident or weather damage, major parts replacement, non-listed services, costs above approved rates, commercial vessels, pre-existing conditions.

4. Dealer Network

All covered services must be performed by a Whitestone Partners certified dealer. Non-certified dealer services are not covered.

5. Cancellation Policy

Cancellation and refund terms will be provided at the time of contract purchase.

6. Limitation of Liability

Total liability shall not exceed the original contract price. We are not liable for incidental or consequential damages.

7. Disputes

Disputes submitted to good-faith negotiation first; unresolved within 30 days proceed to binding arbitration.

8. Contact

Whitestone Partners LLC — [email protected] — St. George, Utah
